external_services.service_name: Computation and Collection of Real Property Tax and Issuance of Real Property Tax Clearance

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Declaration of Real Property Value (DRPV)/ Tax Declaration for newly transferred or declared – 1 original copy
Latest Official Receipt (OR) of RPT payment – 1 original copy or photocopy
Tax Clearance/ Certification fee – Official Receipt – 1 original copy

steps.client_step: 1. Submit all the requirements and secure the Statement of Account/Order of Payment
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive the required documents and check the completeness
steps.person_responsible: Local Treasury Operations Officer III / Assistant / Administrative Assistant IV / Revenue Collection Clerk II (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit all the requirements and secure the Statement of Account/Order of Payment
steps.agency_action: 1.2. Compute Real Property Tax and issue Statement of Account
steps.person_responsible: Local Treasury Operations Officer III / Assistant / Administrative Assistant IV / Revenue Collection Clerk II (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit all the requirements and secure the Statement of Account/Order of Payment
steps.agency_action: 1.3. Issue Order of Payments for Tax Clearance Fee
steps.person_responsible: Local Treasury Operations Officer III / Assistant / Administrative Assistant IV / Revenue Collection Clerk II (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

steps.client_step: 2. Pay the required RPT/Fee by showing the SOA/Order of Payment
steps.agency_action: 2.1. Accept the payment based on SOA/ Order of Payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.fees: See Article A of the Revised Revenue Code of the City of Lipa 1993 (below transfer tax – P50.00)
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk III / II / I (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Return to windows 1 – 3 for the processing of Tax Clearance
steps.agency_action: 3.1. Check the Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Local Treasury Operations Officer IV / III / Assistant / Administrative Assistant IV / Revenue Collection Clerk II (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Return to windows 1 – 3 for the processing of Tax Clearance
steps.agency_action: 3.2. Issue Tax Clearance to the Client
steps.person_responsible: Local Treasury Operations Officer IV / III / Assistant / Administrative Assistant IV / Revenue Collection Clerk II (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

total.fees: See Article A of the Revised Revenue Code of the City of Lipa 1993 (below transfer tax – P50.00)

external_services.service_name: Collection of Business Taxes, Fees and Other Charges
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C - Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Businesses

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Accomplished application form with complete supporting documents/ requirements and properly encoded in Business Permits and Licensing Office – 1 original copy
checklist_of_requirements.source: Lipa City Permits and Licensing Office

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Certification of Real Property Tax Payment – 1 original copy

steps.client_step: 1. Submit all the requirements and secure the Statement of Account/Order of Payment
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive the required documents and check for completeness
steps.person_responsible: Local Treasury Operations Officer IV / Assistant / Officer I, Revenue Collection Clerk III, Administrative Assistant IV, Admin Aide, Cash Clerk II (Business Tax & Fees Division - Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit all the requirements and secure the Statement of Account/Order of Payment
steps.agency_action: 1.2. Compute Business Tax and other regulatory fee and charges and issue reviewed Tax Order Payment.
steps.person_responsible: Admin Aide IV, Local Revenue Collection Officer III, Local Treasury Operations Assistant (Treasury Operations Review - Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

steps.client_step: 2. Pay Business Tax, Fees and Charges and secure Official Receipt
steps.agency_action: 2. Accept payment based on the Order of Payments and issue Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk III / II / I (Cash Receipts Division - Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

external_services.service_name: Collection of Business Taxes, Fees and Other Charges from Business Retirement

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Accomplished application form for retirement with complete supporting documents/ requirements and properly encoded in Lipa City Permits and Licensing Office
checklist_of_requirements.source: Lipa City Permits and Licensing Office

steps.client_step: 1. Submit all the requirements and secure the Statement of Account/ Order of Payment
steps.agency_action: 1. Compute business tax and other regulatory fees and charges and issue reviewed Tax Order of Payment based on submitted documents
steps.person_responsible: Business Tax & Fees Division Personnel / Real Property Tax Division Personnel / Treasury Operations Review (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

steps.client_step: 2. Pay Business Tax, Fees and Charges and secure Official Receipt
steps.agency_action: 2. Accept payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.fees: Retirement fee – P100.00 if no declared assets (See table of fees for other charges)
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collections Clerk II (Cash Receipts Division - Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

total.fees: Retirement fee – P100.00 (if no declared assets) + applicable Business Taxes

external_services.service_name: Issuance of Transfer Tax Payment of Real Property and Certificate

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Official Receipt of Transfer Tax payment and Certification Fee payment
Updated Real Property Tax Clearance and Updated Tax Declaration (Land, Building, Machineries, etc.) or Certificate of No Improvement
Deed of Absolute Sale/ Donation/ Assignment/ Extra-Judicial Settlement or other document of Transfer or Conveyance
Original Certificate of Title (OCT)/ Transfer Certificate of Title (TCT) and Certification Authorizing Registration (CAR) from BIR
Capital Gains Tax Return/ Donor’s Tax Return/ Estate Tax Return and Documentary Stamp Return from BIR
Special Power of Attorney (SPA) if representative
Valid Mayor’s Permit in Lipa (for Real Estate Developer/ Subdivision/ Operator)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit all the requirements
steps.agency_action: 1. Compute and prepare real property transfer tax order of payment based on complete transfer documents
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk III, Local Treasury Operations Officer I, Administrative Assistant IV (Business Tax & Fees Division - Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

steps.client_step: 2. Pay Transfer Tax, Fees and Charges and secure Official Receipt
steps.agency_action: 2. Accept payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.fees: Transfer tax (See table below), Certification fee - PHP 50.00
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk III / II (Cash Receipts Division - Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Receive Transfer Tax Certificate
steps.agency_action: 3. Verify transfer tax documents, prepare and issue certification of transfer tax payment
steps.person_responsible: Local Treasury Operations Officer III / I, Revenue III, Administrative Assistant IV, City Treasurer, Asst. City Treasurer (Business Tax & Fees Division - Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

total.fees: Transfer Tax (Table U) + PHP 50.00 Certification Fee

service_notice.service_name: U. Transfer of Real Property Ownership
service_notice.processing_fee: 75% of 1% of the total consideration or the fair market value, whichever is higher

external_services.service_name: Assessment and Collection of Additional Business Tax, Fees and Charges through Examination of Books of Accounts and Issuance of Certificate of Tax Clearance

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Official Receipt of Transfer Tax payment and Certification Fee payment
Updated Real Property Tax Clearance, Updated Tax Declaration (Land, Building, Machineries, and other improvements), or Certificate of No Improvement
Deed of Absolute Sale/ Donation/ Assignment/ Extra-Judicial Settlement or other document of Transfer or Conveyance
Original Certificate of Title (OCT)/ Transfer Certificate of Title (TCT)
Certification Authorizing Registration (CAR) from BIR
Capital Gains Tax Return/ Donor’s Tax Return/ Estate Tax Return from BIR, and Documentary Stamp Return from BIR
Special Power of Attorney (SPA) if representative
Real Estate Developer/ Subdivision/ Operator (Valid Mayor’s Permit in Lipa)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit all the requirements
steps.agency_action: 1. Compute and prepare real property transfer tax order of payment based on complete transfer documents
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk III, Local Treasury Operations Officer I, Administrative Assistant IV (Business Tax & Fees Division - Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

steps.client_step: 2. Pay Transfer Tax, Fees and Charges and secure Official Receipt
steps.agency_action: 2. Accept payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.fees: Transfer tax (see table U), Certification fee – PHP 50.00
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk III/II (Cash Receipts Division - Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Receive Transfer Tax Certificate
steps.agency_action: 3. Verify transfer tax documents, prepare and issue certification of transfer tax payment
steps.person_responsible: Local Treasury Operations Officer III/I, Revenue III, Administrative Assistant IV, City Treasurer, Asst. City Treasurer (Business Tax & Fees Division - Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

total.fees: Transfer tax (Table U) + PHP 50.00 Certification fee

external_services.service_name: Assessment and Collection of Additional Business Tax, Fees and Charges through Examination of Books of Accounts and Issuance of Certificate of Tax Clearance

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Citation Ticket
checklist_of_requirements.source: Lipa City Public Order and Safety Office (LCPOS) or Lipa City Environment and Natural Resources Office (LCENRO)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit the required document
steps.agency_action: 1. Receive the required document and encode the details specified therein
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collections Clerk III / II (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

steps.client_step: 2. Pay the required fine and secure Official Receipt
steps.agency_action: 2. Accept payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.fees: Based on Citation Ticket from LCPOS/ LCENRO
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collections Clerk III / II (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Go to CPOS/CENRO for clearance
steps.agency_action: None
steps.person_responsible: N/A

total.fees: With citation ticket from LCPOS/ LCENRO

external_services.service_name: Collection of Fees from Building Permits, Occupancy Certificates and Building Repair Permits

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Order of payment with summary of fees from Engineering Office (electrical, mechanical, plumbing, electronic, accessories of the building structures, and other related fees)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit the required document
steps.agency_action: 1. Receive the Order of Payment for building permit fee, contractor’s tax, occupancy certificate fee and building repair permit fee from CEO
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk III / II / I (Cash Receipts Division - Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

steps.client_step: 2. Pay the required tax/fee and secure Official Receipt
steps.agency_action: 2. Accept payment. Issue Official Receipt
steps.fees: Based on Order of payment from CEO
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk III / II / I (Cash Receipts Division - Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

total.fees: Based on Order of payment from CEO

external_services.service_name: Collection of Tax on Delivery Truck/Van and Issuance of Delivery Truck/Van Sticker

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Registration of motor vehicle (1 xerox copy)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit the required document
steps.agency_action: 1. Receive the required document and encode the data provided by the taxpayer
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collections Clerk III / II / I (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Withholding tax certificate (1 original copy/ xerox copy)
Certification of gross receipts (1 original copy/ xerox copy)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit all the required documents and fill-up form
steps.agency_action: 1. Accept the required documents and filled-up form and encode the date provided by the taxpayer
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk III / II (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

steps.client_step: 2. Pay the required community tax and secure Community Tax Certificate (CTC)
steps.agency_action: 2. Accept payment and issue Community Tax Certificate
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk III / II (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

external_services.service_name: Issuance of Accountable Forms (AF 51 and CTC) to Barangays

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Bond risk number (1 original copy/ xerox copy)
Clearance from Accounting Dept. for previous requisitions (1 original copy/ xerox copy)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit all the requirements to TORD and secure the Order of Payment
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive the required documents and check for completeness; 1.2. Issue the Requisition Slip and Order of Payment if all the required documents were given
steps.person_responsible: Local Treasury Operations Officer II, Local Treasury Operations Assistant, Local Revenue Collection Officer III (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

steps.client_step: 2. Pay the required fees by showing the Order of Payment and secure Official Receipt
steps.agency_action: 2. Accept payment based on Order of Payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Return to TORD for the issuance of Accountable Form
steps.agency_action: 3. Check the OR and issue the Accountable Form
steps.person_responsible: Local Treasury Operations Officer II, Local Treasury Operations Assistant, Local Revenue Collection Officer III (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

external_services.service_name: Issuance of Professional Tax Receipt/ Collection of Calling Fee

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: PRC ID (1 original copy/ xerox copy)
Valid ID (1 original/xerox)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit all the requirements
steps.agency_action: 1. Receive the required documents and encode the data provided by the taxpayer
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II / I (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

steps.client_step: 2. Pay the required professional tax/calling fee and secure Official Receipt
steps.agency_action: 2. Accept the payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II / I (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Weights or measures to be calibrated

steps.client_step: 1. Present weights to be calibrated
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Calibrate weights; 1.2. Affix calibration sticker; 1.3. Issue Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: Local Treasury Operations Assistant, Administrative Aide VI (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

steps.client_step: 2. Pay the required calibration fee and sticker and secure Official Receipt
steps.agency_action: 2. Accept the payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II / I (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)
